infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: LogiTrack needs your location to track deliveries
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: LogiTrack needs background location access to track your route even when the app is closed
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: LogiTrack needs camera access to take delivery photos
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: LogiTrack needs photo library access to attach delivery photos

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow LogiTrack to use your location for delivery tracking.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow LogiTrack to access your camera for delivery photos.
